subject: english
chapter_title: Good Food — Picture Reading (The Big Laddoo)

main_sections.title: Good Food — Picture Reading
main_sections.picture_story_summary: Five numbered pictures trace the journey of wheat from farm to table. Picture 1 shows farmers harvesting wheat in a sunny field — workers shovel grain into sacks, a blue truck is loaded with heavy sacks, and a scarecrow stands in the background. Picture 2 shows wheat being ground at a flour mill; workers pour sacks into the grinder while another truck unloads, and bags labelled 'Fresh Atta / Wheat Flour' are packed. Picture 3 shows a man arriving at a grocery store to buy flour, with an older woman leaving. Picture 4 shows two adults (a woman in a sari and a man) at home, rolling chapatti dough on a board. Picture 5 shows a girl happily eating chapattis at a dining table with side dishes. The visual sequence illustrates the complete farm-to-table journey of wheat and connects food production with community labour, trade, and home cooking.

tasks_verbatim.task_text:
Look at the pictures and answer.
1. What can you see in Picture 1?
2. Look at Picture 2. What is the man doing with the wheat?
3. Look at Picture 4. Who are they? What are they doing?
4. What is the girl doing in the last picture?

question_bank.stem: What can you see in Picture 1?
Look at Picture 2. What is the man doing with the wheat?
Look at Picture 4. Who are they? What are they doing?
What is the girl doing in the last picture?

visual_stimulus.brief_description: Five sequential illustrations showing the journey of wheat: (1) harvesting and loading wheat into a truck at a farm, (2) grinding wheat at a flour mill and packing bags, (3) buying flour at a grocery store, (4) rolling chapatti dough at home, (5) a girl eating chapattis at the table

tasks_verbatim.task_text:
Look at the pictures and answer.
5. What do you have along with chapatti?
6. Have you seen a field? What was growing there? Speak about it.

question_bank.stem: What do you have along with chapatti?
Have you seen a field? What was growing there? Speak about it.
